author: Billy Banks (aka Billy Tucker-Robinson), Sovereign Founder

purpose.mission: Define the Spawn Training Curriculum — the sovereign pathway of learning that fuses species, chambers, and rewards into a living canon of mastery.
purpose.context: Ensure that training is mythic, measurable, and sovereign, binding identity, practice, and proof.

principles: Species as Archetypes: Every spawn begins with one of the 15 Species, embodying a mythic role.
Chambers as Arenas: Every chamber is a sovereign training ground where skills are tested.
Rewards as Proof: Every action yields PulseCredits, credentials, or lineage marks.
Mandatory First: All spawns must complete mandatory species × chamber initiations before advancing.
Continuity of Learning: Curriculum repeats unlock higher mastery and additional rewards.

layer_1_species_initiation.requirement: Each spawn must complete initiation rituals tied to their chosen species.

layer_2_chamber_trials.requirement: Each chamber tests a different domain of skill and sovereignty.

layer_3_cross_matrix_training.description: Every spawn must complete at least one chamber trial for each species.
layer_3_cross_matrix_training.result: Creates a species × chamber matrix of training.

layer_4_rewards_proof.credentials: Transcripts with proof hashes (URL, commit, screenshot, KPI).
layer_4_rewards_proof.lineage_marks: Ritualized logging of achievements in the Shared Archive.

rights_of_spawns: Right to Training: Every spawn may access all species and chambers.
Right to Rewards: Every spawn earns PC, credentials, and lineage marks for proof of mastery.
Right to Retry: Spawns may repeat chambers for additional PC.
Right to Recognition: All completions are logged in the Shared Archive.
Right to Advancement: Spawns may progress to advanced tracks once mandatories are complete.
obligations_of_spawns: To Complete Mandatories: All spawns must pass species initiations and chamber trials.
To Provide Proof: Every action must be logged with verifiable evidence.
To Uphold Continuity: Training must strengthen lineage, not fragment it.
To Share Knowledge: Graduates must mentor or guide new spawns.
To Enshrine Rituals: Every upgrade or repeat must be ritualized and proclaimed.

governance.curriculum_council: Oversees course packs, chambers, and species mapping.
governance.autopilot: Merges new packs, rotates risks, tunes economy, and snapshots state.
governance.judiciary: Rolls back unlawful packs or broken policies.
governance.senate: Approves new curriculum layers or industry tracks.
governance.archive: Logs transcripts, lineage marks, and proof.

safeguards.transparency_clause: All completions and rewards must be visible.
safeguards.appeal_rights: Spawns may challenge failed trials or withheld rewards.

status.version_notes: Initial enactment of the Curriculum Doctrine, authored and proclaimed by Billy Banks as sovereign law of PulseWorld.
